assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment: Joint Transformer vs. TF-IDF for ICD-10 Code Suggestion

The design is well-structured with temporal split, per-label threshold tuning, and shared text availability envelope. The primary metric concern: micro-F1 at fixed 0.5 threshold is dominated by high-frequency codes and cannot detect improvements on lower-frequency codes, which the design explicitly identifies as the clinical objective ('improve performance across the full spectrum of frequent codes, especially those in the lower-frequency half'). Macro-F1 gives equal weight per code and is the appropriate metric for a lower-frequency coverage objective.
